<file>
00001| import { getAddress, isAddress } from 'viem'
00002| 
00003| /**
00004|  * Get multiple logo URLs to try in order
00005|  */
00006| export function getTokenLogoFallbacks(
00007|   address: string | null | undefined,
00008|   chainId: number,
00009|   symbol?: string
00010| ): string[] {
00011|   if (!address || address === 'native') {
00012|     const nativeLogos: Record<number, string> = {
00013|       1: 'https://assets.coingecko.com/coins/images/279/small/ethereum.png',
00014|       8453: 'https://assets.coingecko.com/coins/images/279/small/ethereum.png',
00015|       42161: 'https://assets.coingecko.com/coins/images/279/small/ethereum.png',
00016|       137: 'https://assets.coingecko.com/coins/images/4713/small/matic-token-icon.png',
00017|       10: 'https://assets.coingecko.com/coins/images/279/small/ethereum.png',
00018|     }
00019|     return [nativeLogos[chainId] || 'https://assets.coingecko.com/coins/images/279/small/ethereum.png']
00020|   }
00021| 
00022|   const logos: string[] = []
00023|   const lowerSymbol = symbol?.toLowerCase()
00024| 
00025|   // 1. Symbol-based from cryptocurrency-icons (most reliable for major tokens)
00026|   if (lowerSymbol) {
00027|     logos.push(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/${lowerSymbol}.png`)
00028|   }
00029| 
00030|   // 2. TrustWallet (good coverage, requires checksummed address)
00031|   const chainNames: Record<number, string> = {
00032|     1: 'ethereum',
00033|     8453: 'base',
00034|     42161: 'arbitrum',
00035|     137: 'polygon',
00036|     10: 'optimism',
00037|   }
00038|   
00039|   const chainName = chainNames[chainId]
00040|   if (chainName && isAddress(address)) {
00041|     try {
00042|       const checksummed = getAddress(address)
00043|       logos.push(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/${chainName}/assets/${checksummed}/logo.png`)
00044|     } catch (e) {
00045|       // If checksum fails, try lowercase
00046|       logos.push(`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/${chainName}/assets/${address}/logo.png`)
00047|     }
00048|   }
00049| 
00050|   return logos
00051| }
00052| 
</file>
